samples.xml_description:
<module id="edge_detect">
    <description>Implement a module for edge detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="a">Input signal.</input>
        <output id="rise">Output signal indicating a rising edge.</output>
        <output id="down">Output signal indicating a falling edge.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description> 
        <parameter name="INITIAL_VALUE">Initial value of the input signal.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="1">previous_a</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="1">previous_a_1</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="1">previous_a</reg>
            <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="1">previous_a_1</reg>
        </sequential_logic>
        <always>
            <trigger>posedge clk or negedge rst_n</trigger>
            <behavior>
                if (rst_n == 0) begin
                    previous_a <= INITIAL_VALUE;
                    previous_a_1 <= INITIAL_VALUE;
                end else begin
                    previous_a <= a;
                    previous_a_1 <= previous_a;
                end
            </behavior>
        </always>
        <combinational_logic>
            <output id="rise">Output signal indicating a rising edge.</output>
            <output id="down">Output signal indicating a falling edge.</output>
        </combinational_logic>
        <assign>
            <assignee id="rise">1'b0</assignee>
            <assignee id="down">1'b0</assignee>
        </assign>
        <always>
            <trigger>previous_a</trigger>
            <behavior>
                if (previous_a == 1'b0 && previous_a_1 == 1'b1) begin
                    rise = 1'b1;
                end else if (previous_a == 1'b1 && previous_a_1 == 1'b0) begin
                    down = 1'b1;
                end
            </behavior>
        </always>
    </implementation>
</module>
